name: Client Onboarding Automation
description: Complete client onboarding: project, domain, DNS, email, and SSL setup in one workflow
prompts: Update the DNS zone for domain {{DOMAIN_0_ID}} with A record pointing to the project server IP, CNAME for www subdomain, and MX records for Mittwald mail servers
Request a free Let's Encrypt SSL certificate for {{DOMAIN_0_FQDN}} including the www subdomain

Verify the complete setup by showing project {{PROJECT_ID}} details, virtualhost {{VIRTUALHOST_0_ID}} configuration, mail address {{MAIL_ADDRESS_0_ADDRESS}}, and certificate status for {{DOMAIN_0_FQDN}}
